title: GRANT does not work for UPDATE
poc: create table version (name varchar(10), i int);
key_bug_features: GRANT permission failure for UPDATE operation
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE version (name VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL, i INT CHECK (i >= 0));
INSERT INTO version (name, i) VALUES ('test2', NULL);
UPDATE version SET i = 2 WHERE name = 'test1';
GRANT UPDATE ON version TO user1;
